learnings.question: When performing data analysis on Arabic text, what is the primary drawback of omitting 'Tashkeel' (the pronunciation/vowel markings) to make the dataset simpler and more uniform?
options: It dramatically increases the dataset size and computational processing time by duplicating words.
It prevents APIs from returning the text string in a readable format.
It sacrifices analytical precision because different Arabic words can share the exact same spelling without these markings.
It forces the data analysis tools to automatically reverse the text alignment from right-to-left to left-to-right.
learnings.learning: Analyzing Arabic text without Tashkeel simplifies the data and makes it more uniform, but it introduces the challenge of losing precision because different words can share the identical spelling when their vowel markings are removed.
learnings.articleTitle: Top 20 Words to Understand the Quran: A Data Analysis using Python

learnings.question: According to Surah Ar-Ra’d (13:11), under what condition does Allah change the status or condition of a people?
options: Until they experience a disaster upon the earth
Until they change what is in themselves
Until they sever their ties of kinship
Until they completely stop making supplications
learnings.learning: As stated in Surah Ar-Ra’d 13:11, a key spiritual and moral lesson is that Allah does not change the condition of a people until they first take the responsibility to change what is in themselves.
learnings.articleTitle: The Art of Qada’ and Qadr

learnings.question: In PCIe power management, which specific substate of L1 achieves greater power savings by powering down the electrical circuits of the main link?
learnings.learning: The PCIe L1.1 substate specifically powers down the electrical circuits of the main link to save more energy than the L1.0 state, resulting in an increased wake-up time.
learnings.articleTitle: Power Management States in the context of PCIe

learnings.question: In Islamic belief, what three primary roles define a person's life purpose and balance of devotion and responsibility?
options: Adhering to strict isolation, pursuing intellectual superiority, and avoiding societal engagement
Worshiping Allah, serving as caretakers of the Earth, and preparing for the eternal Hereafter
Rejecting physical creation, pursuing complete self-reliance, and focusing solely on worldly legacy
Seeking absolute wealth, establishing political dominance, and prioritizing physical pleasure
learnings.learning: In Islamic belief, life is a purposeful journey balanced by three core roles: worshiping Allah, serving as caretakers (khalifah) of the Earth, and preparing for the eternal Hereafter.
